content.title: Privacy Policy (UK GDPR)
content.body:
###### Who we are

**MMTUK POLICY RESEARCH GROUP LTD** ("we", "us", "our") operates [https://mmtuk.org](https://mmtuk.org).  
Registered address: **274 Northdown Road, Margate, England, CT9 2PT**.  
Contact: **contact@mmtuk.org**.  
We are the **data controller** for personal data processed via our website and services.

###### What this policy covers

How we collect, use, store, and share personal data in line with UK GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018.

###### The data we collect

**Data you provide:** name, email, organisation, role, messages, newsletter sign-ups, event registrations, donation details (via our payment processor), preferences.  
**Data collected automatically:** IP address, device/browser info, pages viewed, referring site, approximate location, session data, cookies or similar tech.  
**Data from third parties (where relevant):** analytics platforms, payment providers, email/newsletter tools, event tools (limited to what's needed).

###### Purposes and legal bases

- Provide and secure our site/services (legitimate interests; contract if you request something from us).
- Newsletters and updates (consent; withdraw any time).
- Events and community engagement (legitimate interests / contract).
- Donations and payments (contract; legal obligation for accounting).
- Site improvements (legitimate interests for essential operations and security).
- Legal and compliance (legal obligations / legitimate interests).

###### Retention

We keep data only as long as needed, then delete or anonymise. Examples: mailing list (until you unsubscribe); event/donation records (**6 years** for accounting).

###### Sharing your data

We use trusted processors under Data Processing Agreements, e.g.:  
Email/forms/events: ActionNetwork  
Donations: Stripe (via ActionNetwork integration)  
Hosting: Railway.app  
We do **not** sell personal data.

###### International transfers

If data is transferred outside the UK/EEA, we use appropriate safeguards (UK IDTA/Standard Contractual Clauses and supplementary measures).

###### Your rights

You can request access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, portability, and withdraw consent. Email **contact@mmtuk.org**. You can complain to the **ICO** (ico.org.uk); we'd appreciate a chance to resolve issues first.

###### Children

Our services aren't directed to children under 16. If you believe we've collected data from a child, contact us.

###### Security

We use reasonable technical and organisational measures (encryption in transit, access controls, least-privilege, logging). No method is 100% secure.

###### Cookies

See our **Cookie Preferences** page at **/cookie-preferences** for details and controls.

###### Changes to this policy

We'll update this page when needed and adjust the "Last updated" date.

###### Contact

MMTUK POLICY RESEARCH GROUP LTD — **contact@mmtuk.org** — **274 Northdown Road, Margate, England, CT9 2PT**
